The following events took place in '''4250 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]''':

==Events==
*The [[Third Great Schism]] occurs in which [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] wage war against the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and then flee to the [[Vultar system/Legends|Vultar system]].<ref name="NEC" />
*The [[Vultar Cataclysm]] occurs in which the Dark Jedi responsible for the Third Great Schism destroy the Vultar system.<ref name="NEC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}}
